name: Delicious Turkey Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour drippings from the turkey roasting pan into a bowl. Allow the fat to rise to the top.
2. Measure the required amount of fat back into the roasting pan. Skim any excess fat from the drippings.
3. Add liquid to the remaining meat juice in the roasting pan to reach the desired amount for gravy.
4. Gradually blend flour into the fat in the roasting pan over low heat, stirring until bubbly and brown.
5. Remove from heat and gradually add liquid, stirring constantly.
6. Cook and stir until thickened.
7. Simmer for 5 minutes.
8. Season to taste.
